note: Source of truth for the everyday-conversations curriculum: ~8 categories × 4-6 scenario dialogues. Edit THIS file, then run `npm run build:conversations` to regenerate frontend/data/conversations.json (adds jyutping). formal = standard written Chinese; colloquial = natural spoken HK Cantonese; en = English gloss. Numbers are written as Chinese characters, never digits.

title.en: Breakfast at a cha chaan teng

lines.formal: 早上好，幾位？
lines.colloquial: 早晨，幾多位呀？
lines.en: Morning — how many?

lines.formal: 一位，謝謝。
lines.colloquial: 一個人，唔該。
lines.en: Just one, thanks.

lines.formal: 這邊坐。想吃什麼？
lines.colloquial: 呢邊坐啦。想食咩呀？
lines.en: Sit over here. What would you like?

lines.formal: 我要一個A餐，火腿通粉配炒蛋。
lines.colloquial: 我要個A餐，火腿通粉配炒蛋。
lines.en: I'll have set A — ham macaroni with scrambled eggs.

lines.formal: 飲品呢？凍飲加兩元。
lines.colloquial: 飲咩呀？凍飲加兩蚊。
lines.en: And to drink? Cold drinks are two dollars extra.

lines.formal: 熱奶茶，謝謝。
lines.colloquial: 熱奶茶，唔該。
lines.en: Hot milk tea, please.

lines.formal: 多士要牛油還是果醬？
lines.colloquial: 多士要牛油定果醬呀？
lines.en: Butter or jam on the toast?

lines.formal: 牛油就可以了。
lines.colloquial: 牛油就得喇。
lines.en: Butter is fine.

lines.formal: 好的，馬上來。
lines.colloquial: 好，即刻嚟。
lines.en: Got it, coming right up.

lines.formal: 麻煩你，結帳。
lines.colloquial: 唔該，埋單！
lines.en: Excuse me — the bill, please!

lines.formal: 一共三十八元。
lines.colloquial: 總共三十八蚊。
lines.en: Thirty-eight dollars in total.

lines.formal: 兩位，有預約嗎？
lines.colloquial: 兩位，有冇訂位呀？
lines.en: Two of you — do you have a reservation?

lines.formal: 沒有，要等多久？
lines.colloquial: 冇呀，要等幾耐？
lines.en: No — how long is the wait?

lines.formal: 大約十五分鐘，請先取票等叫號。
lines.colloquial: 大概十五分鐘，攞張飛等叫號先啦。
lines.en: About fifteen minutes — take a ticket and wait for your number.

lines.formal: 好，我們等一下。
lines.colloquial: 好呀，我哋等陣先。
lines.en: Fine, we'll wait.

lines.formal: 想喝什麼茶？
lines.colloquial: 想飲咩茶呀？
lines.en: What tea would you like?

lines.formal: 普洱，謝謝。
lines.colloquial: 普洱，唔該。
lines.en: Pu-erh, please.

lines.formal: 這是點心紙，請勾選想吃的交給我。
lines.colloquial: 呢張係點心紙，剔咗想食嘅畀我啦。
lines.en: Here's the dim sum sheet — tick what you'd like and hand it back.

lines.formal: 要一籠蝦餃、一籠燒賣，還有叉燒包。
lines.colloquial: 要一籠蝦餃、一籠燒賣，仲有叉燒包。
lines.en: A basket of har gow, a basket of siu mai, and char siu buns.

lines.formal: 還需要什麼嗎？
lines.colloquial: 仲要啲咩呀？
lines.en: Anything else?

lines.formal: 先這樣，不夠再點。
lines.colloquial: 咁多住先，唔夠再叫。
lines.en: That's it for now — we'll order more if it's not enough.

lines.formal: 好的。
lines.colloquial: 好嘅。
lines.en: Sure.

lines.formal: 你好，這裡是德興小菜館。
lines.colloquial: 喂，你好，德興小菜。
lines.en: Hello, Tak Hing Restaurant.

lines.formal: 你好，我想預訂今晚七點的座位，四位。
lines.colloquial: 你好，我想訂今晚七點嘅位，四位唔該。
lines.en: Hi, I'd like to book a table for four at seven tonight.

lines.formal: 今晚七點四位……可以。請問貴姓？麻煩留一個電話。
lines.colloquial: 今晚七點四位……得。請問貴姓呀？唔該留返個電話。
lines.en: Four at seven tonight… no problem. Your surname, please? And a contact number.

lines.formal: 姓王，電話是九一二三四五六七。
lines.colloquial: 姓王，電話九一二三四五六七。
lines.en: Wong — the number is 9123 4567.

lines.formal: 好的，王先生。座位只保留十五分鐘，請準時到。
lines.colloquial: 好嘅，王生。個位淨係留十五分鐘㗎，記得準時嚟呀。
lines.en: Got it, Mr Wong. We only hold the table for fifteen minutes, so please be on time.

lines.formal: 你好，我訂了七點的位子，姓王。
lines.colloquial: 你好，我訂咗七點嘅位，姓王。
lines.en: Hi, I have a seven o'clock reservation under Wong.

lines.formal: 王先生，這邊請。今晚想吃些什麼？
lines.colloquial: 王生，呢邊請。今晚想食啲咩呀？
lines.en: Mr Wong, this way please. What would you like tonight?

lines.formal: 要一個椒鹽鮮魷、一個蒜蓉炒菜心，還有一個清蒸海斑。
lines.colloquial: 要個椒鹽鮮魷、蒜蓉炒菜心，仲有個清蒸海斑。
lines.en: Salt-and-pepper squid, stir-fried choy sum with garlic, and a steamed grouper.

lines.formal: 好的。要幾碗白飯？想喝什麼？
lines.colloquial: 好嘅。要幾多碗白飯？飲咩呀？
lines.en: Sure. How many bowls of rice, and what to drink?

lines.formal: 四碗白飯，一壺熱茶，謝謝。
lines.colloquial: 四碗白飯，一壺熱茶，唔該。
lines.en: Four bowls of rice and a pot of hot tea, please.

lines.formal: 你好，想喝什麼？
lines.colloquial: 你好，想飲咩呀？
lines.en: Hi, what would you like to drink?

lines.formal: 一杯珍珠奶茶，一杯凍檸檬茶。
lines.colloquial: 一杯珍珠奶茶，一杯凍檸茶，唔該。
lines.en: One bubble milk tea and one iced lemon tea, please.

lines.formal: 珍珠奶茶要中杯還是大杯？
lines.colloquial: 珍珠奶茶要中杯定大杯呀？
lines.en: Medium or large for the bubble tea?

lines.formal: 大杯，謝謝。
lines.colloquial: 大杯，唔該。
lines.en: Large, please.

lines.formal: 甜度和冰要怎樣調？
lines.colloquial: 糖同冰要點呀？
lines.en: How would you like the sugar and ice?

lines.formal: 奶茶要少糖少冰，檸檬茶不要冰。
lines.colloquial: 奶茶少甜少冰，檸茶走冰，唔該。
lines.en: Less sugar and less ice for the milk tea, and no ice in the lemon tea.

lines.formal: 沒有問題。一共五十三元。
lines.colloquial: 冇問題。總共五十三蚊。
lines.en: No problem. Fifty-three dollars altogether.

lines.formal: 可以用八達通嗎？
lines.colloquial: 可唔可以嘟八達通呀？
lines.en: Can I pay by Octopus?

lines.formal: 可以，請拍卡。做好了會叫號，你是十六號。
lines.colloquial: 得，嘟呢度啦。整好會叫號㗎喇，你係十六號。
lines.en: Sure — tap here. We'll call your number when it's ready; you're sixteen.

lines.formal: 好的，謝謝！
lines.colloquial: 好呀，唔該晒！
lines.en: Great, thanks!

lines.formal: 下一位！要什麼？
lines.colloquial: 下一位！要咩呀？
lines.en: Next! What would you like?

lines.formal: 一個叉燒飯，不要蔥。
lines.colloquial: 一個叉燒飯，走青，唔該。
lines.en: One char siu rice, no spring onion please.

lines.formal: 堂食還是外帶？
lines.colloquial: 堂食定行街呀？
lines.en: Eating in or takeaway?

lines.formal: 外帶，謝謝。
lines.colloquial: 行街，唔該。
lines.en: Takeaway, please.

lines.formal: 需要餐具嗎？要加一元。
lines.colloquial: 使唔使餐具呀？加一蚊㗎。
lines.en: Do you need cutlery? It's a dollar extra.

lines.formal: 不用了，公司有。
lines.colloquial: 唔使喇，公司有。
lines.en: No need — there's some at the office.

lines.formal: 好的，一共四十八元。請拿收據等叫號。
lines.colloquial: 好，總共四十八蚊。攞住張單等叫號啦。
lines.en: Okay, forty-eight dollars altogether. Take your receipt and wait for your number.

lines.formal: 大約要等多久？
lines.colloquial: 大概要等幾耐呀？
lines.en: About how long is the wait?

lines.formal: 五分鐘左右……六十八號！你的外賣好了。
lines.colloquial: 五分鐘度啦……六十八號！你個外賣好喇。
lines.en: About five minutes… Number sixty-eight! Your takeaway is ready.

lines.formal: 麻煩給我一個袋子，謝謝！
lines.colloquial: 唔該畀個袋我，唔該晒！
lines.en: Could I get a bag please — thanks a lot!

lines.formal: 去哪裡？
lines.colloquial: 去邊呀？
lines.en: Where to?

lines.formal: 麻煩去中環國際金融中心。
lines.colloquial: 唔該去中環IFC。
lines.en: To IFC in Central, please.

lines.formal: 走西隧還是紅隧？
lines.colloquial: 行西隧定紅隧呀？
lines.en: Western Harbour Tunnel or the Cross-Harbour Tunnel?

lines.formal: 可以，哪條快就走哪條。
lines.colloquial: 得，邊條快行邊條啦。
lines.en: Sure — whichever is faster.

lines.formal: 今天塞車，可能要二十分鐘。
lines.colloquial: 今日塞車，可能要二十分鐘。
lines.en: Traffic is bad today — could take twenty minutes.

lines.formal: 沒關係，不趕時間。
lines.colloquial: 唔緊要，唔趕時間。
lines.en: No problem, I'm not in a hurry.

lines.formal: 前面路口停就可以了。
lines.colloquial: 前面路口停就得喇。
lines.en: You can stop at the junction ahead.

lines.formal: 好，九十八元。
lines.colloquial: 好，九十八蚊。
lines.en: Okay — ninety-eight dollars.

lines.formal: 給你一百，不用找了。
lines.colloquial: 畀一百你，唔使找喇。
lines.en: Here's a hundred — keep the change.

lines.formal: 謝謝！
lines.colloquial: 多謝晒！
lines.en: Thanks a lot!

lines.formal: 請問，去中環應該在哪個月台上車？
lines.colloquial: 唔該，去中環應該喺邊個月台上車呀？
lines.en: Excuse me, which platform should I take for Central?

lines.formal: 在對面，走樓梯下去就是。
lines.colloquial: 喺對面，行樓梯落去就係。
lines.en: It's on the other side — take the stairs down.

lines.formal: 需要轉車嗎？
lines.colloquial: 使唔使轉車呀？
lines.en: Do I need to change trains?

lines.formal: 在金鐘轉港島綫。
lines.colloquial: 喺金鐘轉港島綫。
lines.en: Change to the Island Line at Admiralty.

lines.formal: 大約要多久？
lines.colloquial: 大概要幾耐呀？
lines.en: Roughly how long does it take?

lines.formal: 十分鐘左右。
lines.colloquial: 十分鐘度啦。
lines.en: About ten minutes.

lines.formal: 我的八達通沒有錢了，在哪裡增值？
lines.colloquial: 我張八達通冇錢喇，喺邊度增值呀？
lines.en: My Octopus card is out of money — where can I top it up?

lines.formal: 那邊有增值機，客務中心也可以。
lines.colloquial: 嗰邊有增值機，去客務中心都得。
lines.en: There's a top-up machine over there, or the customer service centre.

lines.formal: 明白了，非常感謝！
lines.colloquial: 明喇，唔該晒！
lines.en: Got it — thanks so much!

lines.formal: 不客氣。
lines.colloquial: 唔使唔該。
lines.en: No need to thank me.

lines.formal: 請問這輛車到赤柱廣場嗎？
lines.colloquial: 唔該，呢架車到唔到赤柱廣場㗎？
lines.en: Excuse me, does this minibus go to Stanley Plaza?

lines.formal: 到，上車吧。
lines.colloquial: 到呀，上車啦。
lines.en: It does — hop on.

lines.formal: 多少錢？
lines.colloquial: 幾多錢呀？
lines.en: How much?

lines.formal: 十二元五角，可以拍卡或者付現金，但不設找續。
lines.colloquial: 十二個半，嘟卡或者畀現金都得，不過現金要啱數，冇得找㗎。
lines.en: Twelve fifty — Octopus or cash, but exact fare only; no change given.

lines.formal: 拍卡。請問到赤柱大約要多久？
lines.colloquial: 嘟卡呀唔該。去到赤柱大概要幾耐㗎？
lines.en: Octopus, please. About how long to Stanley?

lines.formal: 不塞車的話，二十五分鐘左右。
lines.colloquial: 唔塞車嘅話，二十五分鐘度啦。
lines.en: If there's no traffic, about twenty-five minutes.

lines.formal: 請問在哪個站下車最近廣場？
lines.colloquial: 唔該，喺邊個站落車最近廣場呀？
lines.en: Which stop is closest to the plaza?

lines.formal: 美利樓那個站最近，快到的時候叫一聲就可以。
lines.colloquial: 美利樓嗰個站最近，就嚟到嗰陣嗌聲「有落」就得㗎喇。
lines.en: The Murray House stop is closest — just shout 'yau lok' when it's coming up.

lines.formal: 明白……前面美利樓，我要下車！
lines.colloquial: 明喇……唔該，前面美利樓有落！
lines.en: Got it… Murray House ahead — getting off, please!

lines.formal: 好的，扶穩。
lines.colloquial: 好，坐穩呀。
lines.en: Okay — hold on tight.

lines.formal: 不好意思，請問滙豐總行大廈怎麼走？
lines.colloquial: 唔好意思，請問滙豐總行點行呀？
lines.en: Excuse me, how do I get to the HSBC Main Building?

lines.formal: 沿這條街一直走，到皇后大道中轉左。
lines.colloquial: 沿住呢條街一直行，去到皇后大道中轉左。
lines.en: Follow this street straight on, then turn left at Queen's Road Central.

lines.formal: 轉左之後呢？
lines.colloquial: 轉咗左之後呢？
lines.en: And after turning left?

lines.formal: 再走大約五分鐘，看到長江中心就轉右，對面就是。
lines.colloquial: 行多大概五分鐘，見到長江中心就轉右，對面就係喇。
lines.en: Walk another five minutes or so; when you see Cheung Kong Center turn right — it's just opposite.

lines.formal: 遠不遠？
lines.colloquial: 遠唔遠㗎？
lines.en: Is it far?

lines.formal: 不遠，十分鐘之內一定到。
lines.colloquial: 唔遠，十分鐘之內實到。
lines.en: Not far — you'll be there within ten minutes for sure.

lines.formal: 需要過馬路嗎？
lines.colloquial: 使唔使過馬路呀？
lines.en: Do I need to cross the road?

lines.formal: 要，不過建議走行人天橋，直接到對面。
lines.colloquial: 要呀，不過最好行天橋，直接過到對面。
lines.en: Yes — but it's best to take the footbridge; it goes straight across.

lines.formal: 明白了，非常感謝！
lines.colloquial: 明喇，真係唔該晒！
lines.en: Got it — thanks so much!

lines.formal: 不客氣，慢慢走。
lines.colloquial: 唔使客氣，慢慢行啦。
lines.en: You're welcome — take your time.

lines.formal: 你好，我想買一張到機場的單程票。
lines.colloquial: 你好，我想買張去機場嘅單程飛。
lines.en: Hi, I'd like a single ticket to the airport.

lines.formal: 好的，成人單程一百三十元。請問怎樣付款？
lines.colloquial: 好，成人單程一百三十蚊。點樣畀錢呀？
lines.en: Sure — an adult single is a hundred and thirty dollars. How would you like to pay?

lines.formal: 用信用卡。請問這裡可以預辦登機手續嗎？
lines.colloquial: 碌卡呀唔該。請問呢度可唔可以預先check-in㗎？
lines.en: By credit card. And can I check in for my flight here?

lines.formal: 可以，市區預辦登機服務在那邊，最遲要在起飛前九十分鐘辦理。
lines.colloquial: 得呀，市區預辦登機喺嗰邊，最遲要喺起飛前九十分鐘搞掂呀。
lines.en: Yes — in-town check-in is over there; you have to do it at least ninety minutes before departure.

lines.formal: 你好，我乘搭國泰CX二五一去倫敦，這是我的護照。
lines.colloquial: 你好，我搭國泰CX二五一去倫敦，護照喺度。
lines.en: Hi, I'm flying Cathay CX251 to London — here's my passport.

lines.formal: 謝謝。有幾件行李需要托運？
lines.colloquial: 唔該。有幾多件行李要寄艙呀？
lines.en: Thanks. How many bags to check in?

lines.formal: 一件。可以安排走廊位嗎？
lines.colloquial: 一件。可唔可以畀個走廊位我呀？
lines.en: One. Could I have an aisle seat?

lines.formal: 可以。這是登機證，閘口是二十三號，七點十五分開始登機。
lines.colloquial: 得。呢張係登機證，二十三號閘口，七點十五分開始登機。
lines.en: Sure. Here's your boarding pass — gate twenty-three, boarding starts at seven fifteen.

lines.formal: 行李會直接送到倫敦嗎？
lines.colloquial: 行李係咪直接送到倫敦㗎？
lines.en: Will my luggage go straight through to London?

lines.formal: 會的，到達之後直接提取就可以了。祝你旅途愉快！
lines.colloquial: 係呀，到咗嗰邊直接攞返就得㗎喇。祝你旅途愉快！
lines.en: Yes — just collect it when you arrive. Have a pleasant trip!

lines.formal: 老闆，這個怎麼賣？
lines.colloquial: 老闆，呢個點賣呀？
lines.en: Boss, how much is this?

lines.formal: 三十元一斤。
lines.colloquial: 三十蚊一斤。
lines.en: Thirty dollars a catty.

lines.formal: 有點貴，能便宜一點嗎？
lines.colloquial: 有啲貴喎，平啲得唔得呀？
lines.en: That's a bit expensive — can you go lower?

lines.formal: 買兩斤算你五十。
lines.colloquial: 買兩斤算你五十啦。
lines.en: Buy two catties and I'll make it fifty.

lines.formal: 好，那要兩斤。
lines.colloquial: 好啦，咁要兩斤。
lines.en: Deal — two catties then.

lines.formal: 還要別的嗎？
lines.colloquial: 仲要唔要第二啲呀？
lines.en: Anything else?

lines.formal: 這些芒果甜不甜？
lines.colloquial: 呢啲芒果甜唔甜㗎？
lines.en: Are these mangoes sweet?

lines.formal: 很甜，不甜不要錢！
lines.colloquial: 好甜㗎，唔甜唔使錢！
lines.en: Very sweet — free if they're not!

lines.formal: 那拿三個。可以用八達通嗎？
lines.colloquial: 咁攞三個啦。可唔可以嘟八達通呀？
lines.en: I'll take three then. Can I pay by Octopus?

lines.formal: 可以，一共七十二元。
lines.colloquial: 得，總共七十二蚊。
lines.en: Sure — seventy-two dollars altogether.

lines.formal: 請問，醬油放在哪裡？
lines.colloquial: 唔該，豉油擺喺邊度呀？
lines.en: Excuse me, where's the soy sauce?

lines.formal: 在三號通道，調味料那一行。
lines.colloquial: 喺三號通道，調味料嗰行。
lines.en: Aisle three, in the condiments row.

lines.formal: 謝謝。還想問一下，這款牛奶還有存貨嗎？貨架上已經沒有了。
lines.colloquial: 唔該。仲想問埋，呢隻牛奶仲有冇貨呀？個貨架冇晒喇。
lines.en: Thanks. One more thing — is this milk still in stock? The shelf is completely empty.

lines.formal: 讓我查一下……倉庫裡還有，我馬上拿給你。
lines.colloquial: 等我check吓先……個倉仲有，我即刻攞畀你。
lines.en: Let me check… there's more in the storeroom, I'll grab it for you right away.

lines.formal: 謝謝。我拿好東西就去付款。
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒。我攞埋嘢就去畀錢。
lines.en: Thanks a lot. I'll go pay once I've got everything.

lines.formal: 一共一百四十六元。需要膠袋嗎？現在有膠袋徵費，要收一元。
lines.colloquial: 總共一百四十六蚊。需唔需要膠袋呀？而家有膠袋徵費，要收一蚊㗎。
lines.en: A hundred and forty-six dollars altogether. Do you need a plastic bag? There's a bag levy now — one dollar each.

lines.formal: 不用了，我帶了環保袋。可以用八達通付款嗎？
lines.colloquial: 唔使喇，我帶咗環保袋。可唔可以嘟八達通呀？
lines.en: No need — I brought a reusable bag. Can I pay by Octopus?

lines.formal: 可以，請拍卡……好了，這是收據。
lines.colloquial: 得，唔該嘟卡……得喇，呢張係收據。
lines.en: Sure — tap your card please… done, here's your receipt.

lines.formal: 謝謝，再見！
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒，拜拜！
lines.en: Thanks so much, bye!

lines.formal: 請問，這件襯衫有沒有大一個尺碼？
lines.colloquial: 唔該，呢件恤衫有冇大個碼呀？
lines.en: Excuse me, does this shirt come in a size up?

lines.formal: 你平時穿什麼尺碼？我幫你找找。
lines.colloquial: 你平時著咩size㗎？我幫你搵吓。
lines.en: What size do you usually wear? Let me look for you.

lines.formal: 我穿M碼，不過這件好像有點窄。
lines.colloquial: 我著M，不過呢件好似窄咗啲。
lines.en: I wear a medium, but this one seems a bit tight.

lines.formal: 這件是L碼，你到試身室試一下吧。
lines.colloquial: 呢件係L碼，你入試身室試吓啦。
lines.en: This one's a large — go try it in the fitting room.

lines.formal: 挺好，很合身。除了白色，還有沒有其他顏色？
lines.colloquial: 幾好喎，好啱身。除咗白色，仲有冇第二隻色呀？
lines.en: It fits really well. Apart from white, do you have other colours?

lines.formal: 還有淺藍色和灰色。現在有特價，買兩件打七折。
lines.colloquial: 仲有淺藍同灰色。而家做緊特價，買兩件七折。
lines.en: There's also light blue and grey. There's a promotion on — thirty percent off if you buy two.

lines.formal: 那我白色和淺藍色各要一件。多少錢？
lines.colloquial: 咁我白色同淺藍各要一件。幾多錢呀？
lines.en: Then I'll take one in white and one in light blue. How much?

lines.formal: 一件四百五十元，兩件打七折就是六百三十元。
lines.colloquial: 一件四百五，兩件七折即係六百三十蚊。
lines.en: Four hundred and fifty each — with the discount, two come to six hundred and thirty dollars.

lines.formal: 好的。袖子有點長，可以幫我改短一點嗎？
lines.colloquial: 好呀。對袖長咗啲，可唔可以幫我改短啲呀？
lines.en: Great. The sleeves are a bit long — could you shorten them for me?

lines.formal: 沒問題，修改免費，星期四可以來取。
lines.colloquial: 冇問題，改衫免費，禮拜四嚟攞得㗎喇。
lines.en: No problem — alterations are free, and you can pick them up on Thursday.

lines.formal: 你好，我想看看這部新手機。跟上一代比有什麼分別？
lines.colloquial: 唔該，我想睇吓呢部新機。同上一代比有咩分別呀？
lines.en: Hi, I'd like a look at this new phone. What's different from the last generation?

lines.formal: 這部的晶片快了很多，鏡頭也升級了，電池更可以多用兩個小時。
lines.colloquial: 呢部粒chip快好多，個鏡頭又升級咗，粒電仲可以多用兩個鐘。
lines.en: The chip on this one is much faster, the camera's upgraded, and the battery lasts a good two hours longer.

lines.formal: 多少錢？隔壁的店便宜二百元，你們可以跟價嗎？
lines.colloquial: 幾多錢呀？隔籬舖平二百蚊喎，你哋跟唔跟價呀？
lines.en: How much is it? The shop next door is two hundred dollars cheaper — will you match the price?

lines.formal: 我們賣六千七百八十元。他們賣多少錢？如果有單據，我可以向經理申請跟價。
lines.colloquial: 我哋賣六千七百八。佢哋賣幾多錢呀？有quote嘅話，我可以同經理申請跟價。
lines.en: We sell it for six thousand seven hundred eighty. What's their price? If you've got a quote, I can ask my manager to match it.

lines.formal: 六千五百八十元。另外，保養是怎樣的？
lines.colloquial: 六千五百八。仲有，保養係點㗎？
lines.en: Six thousand five hundred eighty. Also, how does the warranty work?

lines.formal: 行貨有一年原廠保養，加三百元可以延長多一年。
lines.colloquial: 行貨有一年原廠保養，加三百蚊可以延長多一年。
lines.en: Official stock comes with a one-year manufacturer warranty — three hundred dollars more extends it another year.

lines.formal: 我的舊手機可以以舊換新嗎？
lines.colloquial: 我部舊機可唔可以trade-in呀？
lines.en: Can I trade in my old phone?

lines.formal: 可以，讓我先檢查一下……沒有刮花損壞，可以抵一千二百元。
lines.colloquial: 得呀，等我驗吓部機先……冇花冇崩，可以抵一千二百蚊。
lines.en: Sure, let me inspect it first… no scratches or damage — it'll knock off one thousand two hundred dollars.

lines.formal: 好，那跟價再扣除舊機，就是五千三百八十元，對嗎？
lines.colloquial: 好，咁跟埋價再扣trade-in，即係五千三百八，啱唔啱呀？
lines.en: Okay — with the price match and the trade-in, that's five thousand three hundred eighty, right?

lines.formal: 沒錯，還送一個手機套給你。
lines.colloquial: 冇錯，仲送個機套畀你。
lines.en: Correct — and I'll throw in a phone case for you.

lines.formal: 請問，牙膏放在哪裡？
lines.colloquial: 唔該，牙膏擺喺邊度呀？
lines.en: Excuse me, where's the toothpaste?

lines.formal: 在後面那一行，洗髮水旁邊。
lines.colloquial: 喺後面嗰行，洗頭水隔籬。
lines.en: In the row at the back, next to the shampoo.

lines.formal: 我還想買沐浴露，現在有沒有優惠？
lines.colloquial: 我仲想買沐浴露，而家有冇優惠呀？
lines.en: I also want to buy body wash — are there any promotions right now?

lines.formal: 這個牌子買二送一，很划算。
lines.colloquial: 呢隻牌子買二送一，好抵㗎。
lines.en: This brand is buy-two-get-one-free — a great deal.

lines.formal: 那拿三支吧。還有，有沒有小瓶裝的漱口水？我出差用。
lines.colloquial: 咁攞三支啦。仲有，有冇細支裝嘅漱口水呀？我出trip用。
lines.en: I'll take three then. Also, do you have travel-size mouthwash? It's for a business trip.

lines.formal: 有，旅行裝在收銀處旁邊的貨架上。
lines.colloquial: 有，旅行裝喺收銀處隔籬個架度。
lines.en: Yes — the travel sizes are on the rack beside the checkout.

lines.formal: 好的。麻煩結帳。
lines.colloquial: 好。唔該，埋單。
lines.en: Great. I'll check out, please.

lines.formal: 有會員卡嗎？今天會員有雙倍積分。
lines.colloquial: 有冇會員卡呀？今日會員有雙倍積分㗎。
lines.en: Do you have a member card? Members get double points today.

lines.formal: 沒有，是免費申請的嗎？
lines.colloquial: 冇喎，係咪免費申請㗎？
lines.en: No — is it free to sign up?

lines.formal: 是的，給我一個電話號碼就可以。一共九十八元。
lines.colloquial: 係呀，畀個電話號碼我就得喇。總共九十八蚊。
lines.en: Yes — just give me a phone number. Ninety-eight dollars in total.

lines.formal: 早上好！你好，我叫David，初次見面，請多多指教。
lines.colloquial: 早晨！你好呀，我叫David，以後請多多指教。
lines.en: Good morning! Hi, I'm David — nice to meet you.

lines.formal: 你好，我是陳小姐，叫我阿珍就可以了。
lines.colloquial: 你好呀，我係陳小姐，叫我阿珍就得喇。
lines.en: Hello, I'm Ms Chan — just call me Ah Jan.

lines.formal: 很高興認識你。
lines.colloquial: 好開心識到你。
lines.en: Very happy to meet you.

lines.formal: 你是新來的同事嗎？
lines.colloquial: 你係唔係新嚟嘅同事呀？
lines.en: Are you the new colleague?

lines.formal: 是的，我剛從倫敦調過來。
lines.colloquial: 係呀，我啱啱由倫敦調過嚟。
lines.en: Yes, I just transferred over from London.

lines.formal: 歡迎你！習慣香港的生活嗎？
lines.colloquial: 歡迎你呀！香港嘅生活習唔習慣呀？
lines.en: Welcome! Are you getting used to life in Hong Kong?

lines.formal: 還可以，就是天氣有點熱。
lines.colloquial: 都OK，不過天氣有啲熱。
lines.en: It's okay — the weather is a bit hot though.

lines.formal: 慢慢就會習慣了。有需要隨時找我。
lines.colloquial: 慢慢就會習慣㗎喇。有咩需要隨時搵我。
lines.en: You'll get used to it. Come find me any time you need something.

lines.formal: 謝謝你！
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒你！
lines.en: Thank you so much!

lines.formal: 不用客氣。
lines.colloquial: 唔使客氣。
lines.en: You're welcome.

lines.formal: 今天外面很悶熱，走兩步已經滿身汗。
lines.colloquial: 今日出面好焗呀，行兩步已經成身汗。
lines.en: It's so muggy outside today — two steps and you're drenched in sweat.

lines.formal: 是啊，回南天嘛，整幅牆壁都滲水了。
lines.colloquial: 係呀，回南天嘛，成幅牆都出晒水。
lines.en: Yeah, that's the humid season for you — the walls are all sweating.

lines.formal: 天文台說下午還會有狂風雷暴。
lines.colloquial: 天文台話下晝仲會有狂風雷暴喎。
lines.en: And the Observatory says there'll be squally thunderstorms this afternoon.

lines.formal: 什麼，又下雨？我今天早上剛好沒帶傘。
lines.colloquial: 吓，又落雨？我今朝啱啱冇帶遮添。
lines.en: What, rain again? And I didn't bring an umbrella this morning of all days.

lines.formal: 不要緊，我桌上有一把備用傘，借給你吧。
lines.colloquial: 唔緊要，我張枱度有把後備遮，借畀你啦。
lines.en: No worries — I've got a spare umbrella at my desk, I'll lend it to you.

lines.formal: 謝謝。說真的，外面熱得要命，進到辦公室又冷得發抖。
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒。講真，出面熱到死，入到office又凍到震。
lines.en: Thanks. Honestly, it's boiling outside and freezing once you're in the office.

lines.formal: 就是，冷氣開到十八度，我每天都要帶一件外套上班。
lines.colloquial: 係囉，冷氣開到十八度，我日日都要帶件外套返工。
lines.en: Right? The aircon is set to eighteen degrees — I have to bring a jacket to work every day.

lines.formal: 你可以跟行政部說一聲，調高一兩度嗎？
lines.colloquial: 你可唔可以同admin講聲，較高一兩度呀？
lines.en: Can you ask admin to turn it up a degree or two?

lines.formal: 我試過了，他們說是中央控制，調不了。
lines.colloquial: 我試過喇，佢哋話係central control，較唔到㗎。
lines.en: I've tried — they say it's centrally controlled and can't be adjusted.

lines.formal: 那只好多穿一件衣服了。希望星期六天晴，可以出去走走。
lines.colloquial: 咁唯有著多件衫啦。希望星期六好天，可以出去行吓。
lines.en: Then I'll just have to layer up. Hope it's sunny on Saturday so we can get out for a walk.

lines.formal: 這個週末有什麼計劃嗎？
lines.colloquial: 今個週末有冇咩plan呀？
lines.en: Any plans this weekend?

lines.formal: 暫時還沒有，怎麼了？
lines.colloquial: 暫時都未有喎，做咩呀？
lines.en: Nothing yet — why?

lines.formal: 不如星期六去西九文化區的藝術展吧，聽說很不錯。
lines.colloquial: 不如星期六去西九嗰個藝術展啦，聽講幾好睇。
lines.en: How about the art exhibition in West Kowloon on Saturday? I hear it's really good.

lines.formal: 星期六早上我要去健身室，下午才有空。三點可以嗎？
lines.colloquial: 星期六朝早我要去gym，下晝先得閒。三點得唔得呀？
lines.en: Saturday morning I've got the gym — I'm only free in the afternoon. Does three work?

lines.formal: 三點可以。看完展覽不如順便吃晚飯？
lines.colloquial: 三點得。睇完不如食埋晚飯先走？
lines.en: Three works. How about dinner after the exhibition?

lines.formal: 好啊，我很久沒吃泰國菜了。
lines.colloquial: 好呀，我好耐冇食泰國菜喇。
lines.en: Great — I haven't had Thai food in ages.

lines.formal: 那我先訂位。在哪裡集合好？
lines.colloquial: 咁我book定位先。喺邊度集合好呀？
lines.en: I'll book a table then. Where should we meet?

lines.formal: 不如兩點四十五分在九龍站閘口等吧。
lines.colloquial: 不如兩點四十五喺九龍站閘口等啦。
lines.en: Let's meet at the Kowloon Station gates at two forty-five.

lines.formal: 沒問題。如果下大雨就改期吧。
lines.colloquial: 冇問題。如果落大雨就改期呀。
lines.en: No problem. If it pours we'll reschedule.

lines.formal: 好，到時候用WhatsApp確認吧。
lines.colloquial: 好，到時WhatsApp confirm啦。
lines.en: Okay — we'll confirm on WhatsApp nearer the time.

lines.formal: 今晚下班去喝一杯嗎？
lines.colloquial: 今晚收工去唔去飲返杯呀？
lines.en: Drinks after work tonight?

lines.formal: 好啊，去哪裡？
lines.colloquial: 好呀，去邊度好？
lines.en: Sure — where should we go?

lines.formal: 蘭桂坊新開了一間酒吧，聽說不錯。
lines.colloquial: 蘭桂坊新開咗間酒吧，聽講幾好。
lines.en: A new bar opened in Lan Kwai Fong — supposedly quite good.

lines.formal: 幾點去？
lines.colloquial: 幾點去呀？
lines.en: What time?

lines.formal: 七點半怎樣？我來訂位。
lines.colloquial: 七點半得唔得呀？我訂位。
lines.en: Does half past seven work? I'll book a table.

lines.formal: 沒問題。要叫其他同事嗎？
lines.colloquial: 冇問題。使唔使叫埋其他同事呀？
lines.en: No problem. Should we invite the other colleagues too?

lines.formal: 好主意，我在群組說一聲。
lines.colloquial: 好主意，我喺group度講聲。
lines.en: Good idea — I'll mention it in the group chat.

lines.formal: 今天我請客，慶祝項目完成！
lines.colloquial: 今日我請，慶祝個project搞掂！
lines.en: My treat today — to celebrate finishing the project!

lines.formal: 那就不客氣了！
lines.colloquial: 咁就唔客氣喇！
lines.en: Well, don't mind if I do!

lines.formal: 天氣應用程式說星期日天晴，去不去遠足？
lines.colloquial: 天氣App話星期日好天喎，去唔去行山呀？
lines.en: The weather app says Sunday will be sunny — fancy a hike?

lines.formal: 好啊！走哪條路線好？
lines.colloquial: 好呀！行邊條線好？
lines.en: Sure! Which trail should we do?

lines.formal: 龍脊怎樣？比較初級，兩個多小時就走完。
lines.colloquial: 龍脊點呀？初級啲，兩個幾鐘就行完。
lines.en: How about Dragon's Back? It's beginner-friendly — done in a bit over two hours.

lines.formal: 龍脊我走過了。不如挑戰一下麥理浩徑第二段，西灣的沙灘很漂亮。
lines.colloquial: 龍脊我行過喇。不如挑戰吓麥理浩徑第二段吖，西灣個沙灘好靚㗎。
lines.en: I've done Dragon's Back. How about we take on MacLehose Trail Section Two? The beach at Sai Wan is gorgeous.

lines.formal: 那一段辛苦嗎？我很久沒有遠足了。
lines.colloquial: 嗰段辛唔辛苦㗎？我好耐冇行山喇喎。
lines.en: Is that section tough? I haven't hiked in ages.

lines.formal: 中等難度吧，大約四個小時。記得穿遠足鞋，多帶一些水。
lines.colloquial: 中等難度啦，大概四個鐘。記住著行山鞋，帶多啲水。
lines.en: Moderate difficulty — about four hours. Remember to wear hiking shoes and bring plenty of water.

lines.formal: 好。還要帶什麼？
lines.colloquial: 好。仲要帶啲咩呀？
lines.en: Okay. What else should I bring?

lines.formal: 防曬用品、帽子，還有驅蟲水。山裡的昆蟲很厲害。
lines.colloquial: 防曬、帽，同埋蚊怕水。山入面啲蚊好惡㗎。
lines.en: Sunscreen, a hat, and insect repellent — the bugs up in the hills are vicious.

lines.formal: 知道了。幾點集合？
lines.colloquial: 知道喇。幾點集合呀？
lines.en: Got it. What time do we meet?

lines.formal: 八點半在鑽石山站等，然後坐的士進西貢。太晚出發會很熱。
lines.colloquial: 八點半喺鑽石山站等，跟住搭的士入西貢。遲出發會好熱㗎。
lines.en: Eight-thirty at Diamond Hill Station, then a taxi into Sai Kung. It gets really hot if we set off late.

lines.formal: 早上好！週末過得怎樣？
lines.colloquial: 早晨！週末點呀？
lines.en: Morning! How was your weekend?

lines.formal: 不錯，去了遠足，走了麥理浩徑。
lines.colloquial: 幾好呀，去咗行山，行咗麥理浩徑。
lines.en: Pretty good — went hiking on the MacLehose Trail.

lines.formal: 那麼厲害！我整個週末都在加班。
lines.colloquial: 咁犀利！我成個週末都喺度加班。
lines.en: Impressive! I spent the whole weekend working overtime.

lines.formal: 辛苦了。項目趕得及嗎？
lines.colloquial: 辛苦晒。個project趕唔趕得切呀？
lines.en: Poor you. Will the project make the deadline?

lines.formal: 應該可以，星期五之前要交給客戶。
lines.colloquial: 應該得，星期五之前要交畀客戶。
lines.en: Should be fine — it's due to the client by Friday.

lines.formal: 有需要幫忙就說一聲。
lines.colloquial: 有咩要幫手就出聲。
lines.en: Shout if you need a hand.

lines.formal: 謝謝！中午一起吃飯嗎？
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒！晏晝一齊食飯吖？
lines.en: Thanks! Lunch together at noon?

lines.formal: 好啊，樓下那間新開的日本菜怎樣？
lines.colloquial: 好呀，樓下嗰間新開嘅日本嘢點呀？
lines.en: Sure — how about that new Japanese place downstairs?

lines.formal: 沒問題，十二點半見。
lines.colloquial: 冇問題，十二點半見。
lines.en: No problem — see you at half past twelve.

lines.formal: 明天下午三點開會，你有空嗎？
lines.colloquial: 聽日下晝三點開會，你得唔得閒呀？
lines.en: Meeting at 3pm tomorrow — are you free?

lines.formal: 讓我看看日程……三點有另一個會，四點可以嗎？
lines.colloquial: 等我睇吓個schedule……三點有另一個會，四點得唔得？
lines.en: Let me check my schedule… I have another meeting at three — does four work?

lines.formal: 可以，那改到四點。
lines.colloquial: 得，咁改到四點啦。
lines.en: Sure, let's move it to four.

lines.formal: 在哪個會議室？
lines.colloquial: 喺邊個會議室呀？
lines.en: Which meeting room?

lines.formal: 十樓的大會議室，我發邀請給你。
lines.colloquial: 十樓個大會議室，我send個invite畀你。
lines.en: The big one on the tenth floor — I'll send you an invite.

lines.formal: 議程是什麼？
lines.colloquial: 個agenda係咩呀？
lines.en: What's on the agenda?

lines.formal: 主要討論下一季度的預算。
lines.colloquial: 主要傾吓下個季度嘅預算。
lines.en: Mainly next quarter's budget.

lines.formal: 好，我先準備一下資料。
lines.colloquial: 好，我準備定啲資料先。
lines.en: Okay, I'll get some materials ready.

lines.formal: 麻煩你了，到時見。
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒，到時見。
lines.en: Thanks — see you then.

lines.formal: 阿輝，你現在忙嗎？想請你幫個忙。
lines.colloquial: 阿輝，你而家忙唔忙呀？想請你幫個忙。
lines.en: Fai, are you busy right now? I need a favour.

lines.formal: 不算太忙，什麼事？
lines.colloquial: 唔係好忙，咩事呀？
lines.en: Not too busy — what's up?

lines.formal: 我的Excel檔案不知為何公式全部出錯，弄了一個小時也弄不好。
lines.colloquial: 我個Excel file唔知點解啲formula全部出晒error，搞咗成粒鐘都搞唔掂。
lines.en: For some reason all the formulas in my Excel file are throwing errors — I've been stuck on it for a solid hour.

lines.formal: 讓我看看……哦，你的查表公式指向了錯誤的工作表。
lines.colloquial: 等我睇吓……哦，你個vlookup指錯咗張sheet呀。
lines.en: Let me take a look… ah, your VLOOKUP is pointing at the wrong sheet.

lines.formal: 原來如此！難怪。可以幫我檢查其餘幾個分頁嗎？五點前要發給上司。
lines.colloquial: 原來係咁！唔怪得啦。可唔可以幫我check埋其餘嗰幾個tab呀？五點前要send畀老闆㗎。
lines.en: So that's it! No wonder. Could you check the other tabs for me too? It has to go to the boss by five.

lines.formal: 這麼趕？好吧，我現在幫你過一遍。
lines.colloquial: 咁趕？好啦，我而家幫你過一次。
lines.en: That tight? Alright, I'll go through it with you now.

lines.formal: 真的太感謝你了，救了我一命。
lines.colloquial: 真係唔該晒你，救咗我一命。
lines.en: Thank you so much — you've saved my life.

lines.formal: 小事而已。下次記得先備份，改動之前多複製一個版本。
lines.colloquial: 小意思啦。下次記住backup住先，改嘢之前copy多一個version。
lines.en: It's nothing. Next time remember to back up first — make a copy before you change anything.

lines.formal: 知道了。明天我請你吃午飯，謝謝你幫忙。
lines.colloquial: 知道喇。聽日我請你食lunch，多謝你幫手。
lines.en: Will do. Lunch is on me tomorrow — thanks for the help.

lines.formal: 那就不客氣了，去吃那間新開的雲南米線吧。
lines.colloquial: 咁就唔客氣喇，去食嗰間新開嘅雲南米線吖。
lines.en: Well then I won't say no — let's hit that new Yunnan rice-noodle place.

lines.formal: 王經理，早上好。不好意思，我今天不舒服，想請一天病假。
lines.colloquial: 王經理，早晨。唔好意思，我今日有啲唔舒服，想攞一日sick leave。
lines.en: Good morning, Mr Wong. Sorry — I'm not feeling well today and would like to take a day of sick leave.

lines.formal: 怎麼了？嚴重嗎？
lines.colloquial: 咩事呀？嚴唔嚴重呀？
lines.en: What's wrong? Is it serious?

lines.formal: 昨晚開始發燒，還有點喉嚨痛，應該是感冒。
lines.colloquial: 琴晚開始發燒，仲有啲喉嚨痛，應該係感冒。
lines.en: I started running a fever last night, and my throat hurts a bit — probably a cold.

lines.formal: 那你好好休息吧。記得看醫生拿病假證明，之後交給人事部。
lines.colloquial: 咁你好好哋休息啦。記住睇醫生攞返張醫生紙，之後交畀HR。
lines.en: Then get some proper rest. Remember to see a doctor and get a doctor's note, and hand it to HR afterwards.

lines.formal: 好，我下午去診所。今天有兩件急事：三點跟客戶的電話會議，還有一份報告今天截止。
lines.colloquial: 好，我下晝去診所。今日有兩樣嘢急：三點同客個con call，仲有份report今日deadline。
lines.en: Okay, I'll go to the clinic this afternoon. Two urgent things today: a three o'clock call with the client, and a report due today.

lines.formal: 電話會議我讓阿Ling代你出席，報告的草稿你發出來了嗎？
lines.colloquial: 個con call我叫阿Ling代你入啦，份report你send咗draft出嚟未呀？
lines.en: I'll have Ling sit in on the call for you — have you sent out a draft of the report yet?

lines.formal: 發了，在團隊的共用資料夾裡，還差最後一部分，我在裡面留了備註。
lines.colloquial: send咗喺team個shared folder度，仲爭最後嗰part，我留咗notes喺入面。
lines.en: Yes, it's in the team's shared folder — just the last part left, and I've left notes inside.

lines.formal: 好，我們會接手跟進。你不用擔心工作，多喝水。
lines.colloquial: 好，我哋會跟進。你唔使擔心公司啲嘢，飲多啲水啦。
lines.en: Okay, we'll take it from here. Don't worry about work — drink plenty of water.

lines.formal: 謝謝經理。如果明天退燒我就回來上班。
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒經理。如果聽日退咗燒我就返嚟返工。
lines.en: Thank you. If the fever's gone tomorrow I'll come back in.

lines.formal: 不用急，完全好了才回來吧。早點休息。
lines.colloquial: 唔使急，好返晒先返啦。早啲抖啦。
lines.en: No rush — come back when you're fully better. Get some rest.

lines.formal: 十二點了，今天午飯吃什麼好？
lines.colloquial: 十二點喇喎，今日lunch食咩好呀？
lines.en: It's twelve — what should we get for lunch today?

lines.formal: 外面好像快要下雨，不如叫外賣回來吃吧。
lines.colloquial: 出面好似就嚟落雨，不如叫外賣返嚟食啦。
lines.en: Looks like it's about to rain outside — let's order delivery and eat in.

lines.formal: 好主意。叫那間泰國菜還是樓下的燒味飯？
lines.colloquial: 好主意。叫嗰間泰國菜定係樓下嘅燒味飯呀？
lines.en: Good idea. That Thai place, or the roast-meat rice downstairs?

lines.formal: 上星期才吃了泰國菜，今天叫燒味吧。我先問問其他人吃什麼。
lines.colloquial: 上星期先食咗泰國菜，今日叫燒味啦。我問吓其他人食咩先。
lines.en: We just had Thai last week — roast meats today. Let me ask what the others want first.

lines.formal: 好。我要叉燒飯，不要蔥，凍檸檬茶少甜。
lines.colloquial: 好。我要叉燒飯走青，凍檸茶少甜。
lines.en: Okay. Char siu rice for me, no spring onions, and an iced lemon tea, less sweet.

lines.formal: 收到。阿May要油雞飯，Ken要燒鴨瀨粉，一共四個餐。
lines.colloquial: 收到。阿May要油雞飯，Ken要燒鴨瀨，總共四個餐。
lines.en: Got it. May wants soy-sauce chicken rice, Ken wants roast duck noodles — four sets altogether.

lines.formal: 你用應用程式下單嗎？我把菜單連結發給你。
lines.colloquial: 你用app落單呀？我send個menu link畀你。
lines.en: Are you ordering on the app? I'll send you the menu link.

lines.formal: 不用了，打電話叫比較快。一共二百四十元。
lines.colloquial: 唔使喇，打電話叫快啲。埋單總共二百四十蚊。
lines.en: No need — phoning it in is faster. It comes to two hundred and forty dollars in total.

lines.formal: 那就是每人六十元，我們用PayMe轉賬給你吧。
lines.colloquial: 咁即係每人六十蚊，我哋PayMe返畀你啦。
lines.en: So that's sixty dollars each — we'll PayMe you back.

lines.formal: 可以，不急。半小時後在茶水間開飯！
lines.colloquial: 得，唔急。半個鐘後pantry開飯！
lines.en: Sure, no rush. Lunch in the pantry in half an hour!

lines.formal: 這家公司上一季度的業績怎樣？
lines.colloquial: 呢間公司上個季度嘅業績點呀？
lines.en: How did this company do last quarter?

lines.formal: 收入按年增長百分之十五，超出預期。
lines.colloquial: 收入按年升咗百分之十五，好過預期。
lines.en: Revenue grew fifteen percent year-on-year — better than expected.

lines.formal: 利潤率呢？
lines.colloquial: 啲margin呢？
lines.en: And margins?

lines.formal: 毛利率維持在百分之四十左右。
lines.colloquial: Gross margin維持喺百分之四十度。
lines.en: Gross margin held at around forty percent.

lines.formal: 管理層對下半年有什麼看法？
lines.colloquial: 管理層對下半年有咩睇法呀？
lines.en: What does management think about the second half?

lines.formal: 他們比較樂觀，計劃擴充東南亞市場。
lines.colloquial: 佢哋比較樂觀，打算擴充東南亞市場。
lines.en: They're fairly optimistic — planning to expand in Southeast Asia.

lines.formal: 風險方面要注意什麼？
lines.colloquial: 風險方面要留意啲咩？
lines.en: What should we watch on the risk side?

lines.formal: 主要是成本上升和匯率波動。
lines.colloquial: 主要係成本上升同埋匯率波動。
lines.en: Mainly rising costs and currency swings.

lines.formal: 好，下星期向投資委員會匯報。
lines.colloquial: 好，下星期上IC匯報。
lines.en: Good — we'll take it to the investment committee (IC) next week.

lines.formal: 我今晚把報告發給你。
lines.colloquial: 我今晚send份報告畀你。
lines.en: I'll send you the report tonight.

lines.formal: 今天大市怎樣？恒生指數是升還是跌？
lines.colloquial: 今日個市點呀？恒指升定跌呀？
lines.en: How's the market today? Is the Hang Seng up or down?

lines.formal: 早上升了百分之二，下午回吐，現在只升三百多點。
lines.colloquial: 朝早升咗百分之二，下晝回落，而家淨係升三百幾點。
lines.en: It was up two percent in the morning but pulled back in the afternoon — now it's only up three-hundred-odd points.

lines.formal: 資金好像在板塊輪動，由科技股轉向銀行股。
lines.colloquial: 啲資金好似rotate緊，由科技股轉去銀行股。
lines.en: Money seems to be rotating — out of tech stocks and into banks.

lines.formal: 是啊。你有沒有看到那隻電動車股？今天早上裂口高開百分之八。
lines.colloquial: 係呀。你有冇睇到嗰隻電動車股？今朝一開市就gap up咗百分之八。
lines.en: Yeah. Did you see that EV stock? It gapped up eight percent at the open this morning.

lines.formal: 為什麼升得那麼急？
lines.colloquial: 做咩升得咁急㗎？
lines.en: Why did it jump so sharply?

lines.formal: 昨晚公布業績，收入超出市場預期百分之二十。
lines.colloquial: 尋晚出咗業績，收入beat咗市場預期百分之二十。
lines.en: Results came out last night — revenue beat market expectations by twenty percent.

lines.formal: 交易部的同事怎麼看？現在追入會不會太遲？
lines.colloquial: Desk啲同事點睇呀？而家追入會唔會太遲？
lines.en: What does the desk think? Is it too late to chase it now?

lines.formal: 他們覺得短線已經超買，不如等回調再考慮。
lines.colloquial: 佢哋覺得短線已經overbought，不如等佢回吓先再諗。
lines.en: They think it's overbought short term — better to wait for a pullback before deciding.

lines.formal: 有道理。那我先放進觀察名單。
lines.colloquial: 有道理喎。咁我擺入個watchlist先。
lines.en: Fair enough — I'll put it on the watchlist for now.

lines.formal: 好，收市後我把圖表發給你。
lines.colloquial: 好呀，收咗市我send個chart畀你。
lines.en: Sure — I'll send you the chart after the close.

lines.formal: 謝謝你抽時間見我們。先談談今年的收入趨勢吧。
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒你抽時間見我哋。不如先講吓今年嘅收入趨勢吖。
lines.en: Thanks for making time to see us. Let's start with this year's revenue trend.

lines.formal: 上半年收入按年增長百分之十二，主要來自大灣區的新客戶。
lines.colloquial: 上半年收入按年升咗百分之十二，主要嚟自大灣區啲新客。
lines.en: First-half revenue grew twelve percent year-on-year, mainly from new customers in the Greater Bay Area.

lines.formal: 不錯。成本方面有壓力嗎？
lines.colloquial: 幾好喎。成本方面有冇壓力呀？
lines.en: Not bad. Any pressure on costs?

lines.formal: 有的，人工和租金都在上升，所以毛利率收窄了兩個百分點。
lines.colloquial: 有呀，人工同租金都升緊，所以gross margin收窄咗兩個百分點。
lines.en: Yes — wages and rent are both rising, so gross margin narrowed by two percentage points.

lines.formal: 你們打算怎樣應對？
lines.colloquial: 咁你哋打算點應對呀？
lines.en: How do you plan to deal with that?

lines.formal: 我們正把部分後勤職能搬到深圳，預計明年可以節省百分之八的營運成本。
lines.colloquial: 我哋而家搬緊部分back office去深圳，預計明年慳返百分之八嘅營運成本。
lines.en: We're moving part of the back office to Shenzhen — that should save eight percent in operating costs next year.

lines.formal: 擴充計劃呢？聽說你們想進軍新加坡。
lines.colloquial: 咁擴充計劃呢？聽講你哋想擴去新加坡。
lines.en: And the expansion plan? We hear you want to enter Singapore.

lines.formal: 對，目標是明年第二季開設辦事處，初期投資大約一千萬港元。
lines.colloquial: 係呀，目標係明年第二季開office，初期投資大概一千萬港紙。
lines.en: Right — we aim to open an office in the second quarter next year, with an initial investment of around ten million Hong Kong dollars.

lines.formal: 明白。下一步我們會做財務盡職調查，下星期把資料清單發給你們。
lines.colloquial: 明白。下一步我哋會做財務DD，下星期send個資料list畀你哋。
lines.en: Understood. Next we'll do financial due diligence — we'll send you the document list next week.

lines.formal: 沒問題，數據室已經準備好了。
lines.colloquial: 冇問題，個data room已經準備好晒。
lines.en: No problem — the data room is all ready.

lines.formal: 你好，我想開一個綜合戶口。
lines.colloquial: 你好，我想開個綜合戶口。
lines.en: Hi, I'd like to open an integrated account.

lines.formal: 好的，請先取一個籌號，帶齊證件在那邊等叫號。
lines.colloquial: 好呀，唔該攞個籌先，帶齊證件喺嗰邊等叫號。
lines.en: Sure — please take a ticket first, and wait over there with your documents until your number is called.

lines.formal: 需要什麼文件？
lines.colloquial: 要咩文件㗎？
lines.en: What documents do I need?

lines.formal: 護照或身份證，還有最近三個月的住址證明，例如水電費單。
lines.colloquial: 護照或者身份證，仲有最近三個月嘅住址證明，例如水電費單。
lines.en: Passport or ID card, plus proof of address from the last three months — a utility bill, for example.

lines.formal: 銀行月結單可以當住址證明嗎？
lines.colloquial: 銀行月結單當唔當到住址證明呀？
lines.en: Does a bank statement count as address proof?

lines.formal: 可以，只要有你的姓名和地址就可以了。
lines.colloquial: 得呀，只要有你個名同地址就得。
lines.en: Yes — as long as it shows your name and address.

lines.formal: 我還想開通網上銀行。
lines.colloquial: 我仲想開埋網上銀行。
lines.en: I'd also like to set up online banking.

lines.formal: 開戶時可以一併登記，之後用手機應用程式做認證就可以了。
lines.colloquial: 開戶嗰陣可以一齊登記埋，之後用個app做個認證就得㗎喇。
lines.en: We can register that when you open the account — then you just verify it in the mobile app.

lines.formal: 大約要等多久？
lines.colloquial: 大概要等幾耐呀？
lines.en: Roughly how long is the wait?

lines.formal: 現在你前面有八個人，大約要等二十分鐘。
lines.colloquial: 而家你前面有八個人，大約要等二十分鐘。
lines.en: There are eight people ahead of you — about a twenty-minute wait.

lines.formal: 張先生，謝謝你安排這次電話會議。我們想再談談估值。
lines.colloquial: 張生，唔該你安排呢個call。我哋想再傾吓個valuation。
lines.en: Mr Cheung, thanks for setting up this call. We'd like to discuss valuation again.

lines.formal: 沒問題。你們上次出價八億，我們的底線是十億，差距還是很大。
lines.colloquial: 冇問題。你哋上次出價八億，我哋條底線係十億，個gap仲係好大。
lines.en: No problem. Your last offer was eight hundred million; our floor is one billion — the gap is still wide.

lines.formal: 根據我們的盡職調查結果，八億五千萬已經是相當進取的估值。
lines.colloquial: 根據我哋DD嘅結果，八億五千萬已經係好aggressive嘅估值。
lines.en: Based on our due diligence findings, eight hundred and fifty million is already quite an aggressive valuation.

lines.formal: 如果九億五千萬，我們可以考慮。
lines.colloquial: 如果九億五千萬，我哋可以考慮吓。
lines.en: At nine hundred and fifty million, we could consider it.

lines.formal: 我們最多可以提高到九億，但條件是要有六十天的獨家談判期。
lines.colloquial: 我哋最多去到九億，不過條件係要六十日exclusivity。
lines.en: We can go up to nine hundred million at most — but on condition of sixty days' exclusivity.

lines.formal: 六十天太長了，四十五天吧。
lines.colloquial: 六十日太長喇，四十五日啦。
lines.en: Sixty days is too long — let's say forty-five.

lines.formal: 可以，但時間表要收緊，目標是九月底簽署買賣協議。
lines.colloquial: 得，不過個timeline要收緊，目標係九月底sign SPA。
lines.en: Fine — but the timeline has to tighten: the target is signing the SPA by the end of September.

lines.formal: 沒問題。修訂後的條款書由誰負責？
lines.colloquial: 冇問題。修訂版嘅term sheet邊個負責呀？
lines.en: No problem. Who's handling the revised term sheet?

lines.formal: 我們的律師起草，明天中午之前發給你們。
lines.colloquial: 我哋啲律師起草，聽日晏晝之前send畀你哋。
lines.en: Our lawyers will draft it — we'll send it over by noon tomorrow.

lines.formal: 好，收到後我們內部審閱，再約下一次會議。
lines.colloquial: 好，收到之後我哋內部review完，再約下一個call。
lines.en: Good — once we receive it we'll review internally, then set up the next call.

lines.formal: 這個單位五百平方呎，兩房一廳，開放式廚房，還有海景。
lines.colloquial: 呢個單位五百呎，兩房一廳，開放式廚房，仲有海景㗎。
lines.en: This flat is five hundred square feet — two bedrooms, a living room, an open kitchen, and a sea view.

lines.formal: 挺不錯。租金一個月多少錢？
lines.colloquial: 幾好喎。租金幾多錢一個月呀？
lines.en: Not bad. How much is the rent per month?

lines.formal: 業主開價兩萬二千元，包括管理費和差餉。
lines.colloquial: 業主開價兩萬二，包管理費同差餉。
lines.en: The landlord is asking twenty-two thousand, inclusive of management fee and rates.

lines.formal: 兩萬二千元有點貴，兩萬一千元可以嗎？
lines.colloquial: 兩萬二有啲貴喎，兩萬一得唔得呀？
lines.en: Twenty-two thousand is a bit steep — would twenty-one thousand work?

lines.formal: 我可以幫你跟業主談談。租約通常是一年死約一年生約。
lines.colloquial: 我可以幫你同業主傾吓。租約通常一年死約一年生約。
lines.en: I can negotiate with the landlord for you. The lease is usually a one-year fixed term plus a one-year break-clause period.

lines.formal: 按金怎麼計算？
lines.colloquial: 按金點計呀？
lines.en: How does the deposit work?

lines.formal: 兩按一上，就是兩個月按金加一個月預付租金。
lines.colloquial: 兩按一上，即係兩個月按金加一個月上期。
lines.en: Two deposits and one advance — that's two months' deposit plus one month's rent up front.

lines.formal: 冷氣和電器有沒有問題？很舊嗎？
lines.colloquial: 冷氣同電器有冇問題㗎？舊唔舊呀？
lines.en: Is there anything wrong with the air-conditioning and appliances? Are they old?

lines.formal: 全部剛剛換過，還有一年保養。你喜歡的話，最快下個月一號可以入住。
lines.colloquial: 全部啱啱換咗，仲有一年保養。你鍾意嘅話，最快下個月一號可以入伙。
lines.en: All just replaced, still under a one-year warranty. If you like it, you could move in as early as the first of next month.

lines.formal: 好，如果業主願意減到兩萬一千元，我就簽約。
lines.colloquial: 好，如果業主肯減到兩萬一，我就簽。
lines.en: Okay — if the landlord will come down to twenty-one thousand, I'll sign.

lines.formal: 你好，我是十五樓B室的住客。明天有朋友來探訪，需要登記嗎？
lines.colloquial: 你好，我係十五樓B室嘅住客。聽日有朋友嚟探我，使唔使登記呀？
lines.en: Hi, I live in Flat B on the fifteenth floor. A friend is visiting tomorrow — do they need to register?

lines.formal: 需要，訪客要在大堂登記，留下姓名和電話就可以。
lines.colloquial: 要呀，訪客要喺大堂登記，留低個名同電話就得㗎喇。
lines.en: Yes — visitors register at the lobby; just a name and phone number will do.

lines.formal: 明白。還有，我星期六有一張梳化送到，想預約貨用升降機。
lines.colloquial: 明白。仲有，我禮拜六有張梳化送嚟，想book埋貨lift。
lines.en: Got it. Also, I have a sofa arriving on Saturday and I'd like to book the freight lift.

lines.formal: 沒問題，貨用升降機要提前一天預約。你想約什麼時間？
lines.colloquial: 冇問題，貨lift要早一日book。你想約幾點呀？
lines.en: No problem — the freight lift has to be booked a day in advance. What time would you like?

lines.formal: 下午兩點到四點可以嗎？
lines.colloquial: 下晝兩點到四點得唔得呀？
lines.en: Would two to four in the afternoon work?

lines.formal: 可以，我幫你記下了。記住搬運工人要使用後門出入。
lines.colloquial: 得，我幫你寫低咗。記住班搬運工人要行後門出入呀。
lines.en: Fine, I've noted it down. Remember the movers have to use the rear entrance.

lines.formal: 好的。另外我想投訴，樓上經常晚上十二點多還在鑽牆，吵得我睡不着。
lines.colloquial: 好。另外我想投訴，樓上成日夜晚十二點幾仲喺度鑽牆，嘈到我瞓唔到。
lines.en: Okay. One more thing — I'd like to complain: the flat upstairs is often still drilling past midnight, so noisy I can't sleep.

lines.formal: 不好意思，裝修時間是早上九點到下午六點。我們會警告那個單位。
lines.colloquial: 唔好意思，裝修時間係朝早九點到下晝六點。我哋會警告嗰個單位。
lines.en: Sorry about that — renovation hours are nine in the morning to six in the evening. We'll warn that unit.

lines.formal: 謝謝。如果再這樣，我可以怎麼辦？
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒。如果再係咁，我可以點做呀？
lines.en: Thanks. If it happens again, what can I do?

lines.formal: 你可以隨時致電管理處，晚上也有人當值。
lines.colloquial: 你可以隨時打嚟管理處，夜晚都有人當值㗎。
lines.en: You can call the management office any time — someone is on duty even at night.

lines.formal: 喂，師傅你好，我家的冷氣機滴水，還滴到樓下的簷篷，想請你來修理。
lines.colloquial: 喂，師傅你好，我屋企部冷氣滴水，仲滴到落樓下個簷篷度，想搵你嚟整。
lines.en: Hello, is that the repairman? My air-conditioner is dripping water — even onto the canopy downstairs — and I'd like you to come fix it.

lines.formal: 那部機是什麼牌子？用了多久？
lines.colloquial: 部機咩牌子㗎？用咗幾耐呀？
lines.en: What brand is the unit? How long have you had it?

lines.formal: 大金，用了五六年。還有廚房的鋅盤堵塞了，排水很慢。
lines.colloquial: 大金，用咗五六年。仲有廚房個鋅盤塞咗，去水好慢。
lines.en: A Daikin, five or six years old. The kitchen sink is blocked too — it drains really slowly.

lines.formal: 冷氣滴水多數是排水管堵塞，或者隔塵網太髒，要清洗一下。兩樣一起處理吧。
lines.colloquial: 冷氣滴水多數係條去水喉塞咗，或者個隔塵網太污糟，要洗吓。兩樣一齊搞啦。
lines.en: A dripping AC is usually a blocked drain pipe or a filthy dust filter that needs cleaning. Let's deal with both in one go.

lines.formal: 好的。要多少錢？
lines.colloquial: 好呀。要幾多錢呀？
lines.en: Sure. How much will it cost?

lines.formal: 清洗冷氣六百元，疏通渠道四百五十元，一起做算你一千元吧。
lines.colloquial: 洗冷氣六百，通渠四百五，一齊做算你一千蚊啦。
lines.en: Six hundred for the AC cleaning, four hundred fifty for unblocking the drain — I'll do both for a thousand.

lines.formal: 好，那你什麼時候有空過來？
lines.colloquial: 好，咁你幾時得閒嚟呀？
lines.en: Okay — when are you free to come?

lines.formal: 明天下午三點到五點可以嗎？我到了會打電話給你。
lines.colloquial: 聽日下晝三點到五點得唔得？我到咗會打畀你。
lines.en: Tomorrow between three and five in the afternoon? I'll call you when I arrive.

lines.formal: 可以。師傅，你收現金嗎？
lines.colloquial: 得。師傅，你收唔收現金㗎？
lines.en: That works. Do you take cash?

lines.formal: 現金或者轉數快都可以。明天見。
lines.colloquial: 現金定轉數快都得。聽日見。
lines.en: Cash or FPS, either is fine. See you tomorrow.

lines.formal: 你好，今天想怎麼剪？
lines.colloquial: 你好，今日想點剪呀？
lines.en: Hi, how would you like it cut today?

lines.formal: 麻煩幫我剪短一點，兩邊剃短，上面留長一些。
lines.colloquial: 唔該幫我cut短啲，兩邊鏟青，上面留返長少少。
lines.en: Shorter, please — fade the sides and leave a bit of length on top.

lines.formal: 兩邊用幾號電剪？三號夠不夠短？
lines.colloquial: 兩邊用幾號呀？三號夠唔夠短？
lines.en: What clipper number for the sides? Is a three short enough?

lines.formal: 三號吧。前面不要剪得太短，我上班要見客戶。
lines.colloquial: 三號啦。前面唔好剪咁短，我返工要見客㗎。
lines.en: A three. Don't take the front too short — I have to see clients at work.

lines.formal: 沒問題。要不要洗頭？洗剪吹一起才一百八十元。
lines.colloquial: 冇問題。使唔使洗埋個頭呀？洗剪吹一齊先一百八十蚊咋。
lines.en: No problem. Would you like a wash too? Wash, cut and blow-dry together is only a hundred and eighty dollars.

lines.formal: 好的，那一起洗吧。
lines.colloquial: 好呀，洗埋啦。
lines.en: Sure, include the wash then.

lines.formal: 剪好了，你看看後面可以嗎？
lines.colloquial: 剪好喇，你睇吓後面得唔得？
lines.en: All done — have a look at the back. Is it okay?

lines.formal: 挺好的，謝謝。一共多少錢？
lines.colloquial: 幾好呀，唔該晒。埋單幾多錢呀？
lines.en: Looks great, thanks. How much do I owe?

lines.formal: 一百八十元。這裡不用給小費，下次再光顧就可以了。
lines.colloquial: 一百八。呢度唔使畀貼士㗎，下次再嚟幫襯就得喇。
lines.en: A hundred and eighty. No need to tip here — just come back next time.

lines.formal: 好的，謝謝，下個月再來。
lines.colloquial: 好，唔該晒，下個月再嚟。
lines.en: Great, thank you — see you next month.

lines.formal: 你好，今天哪裡不舒服？
lines.colloquial: 你好，今日邊度唔舒服呀？
lines.en: Hello — what's bothering you today?

lines.formal: 我發燒，喉嚨也很痛。
lines.colloquial: 我發燒，喉嚨又好痛。
lines.en: I have a fever, and my throat really hurts too.

lines.formal: 這樣多久了？
lines.colloquial: 咁樣幾耐喇？
lines.en: How long has it been like this?

lines.formal: 大概兩天，昨晚燒到三十八度半。
lines.colloquial: 大概兩日喇，尋晚燒到三十八度半。
lines.en: About two days — last night my fever hit thirty-eight point five.

lines.formal: 張開口讓我看看……喉嚨發炎，應該是上呼吸道感染。
lines.colloquial: 擘大口等我睇吓……喉嚨發炎，應該係上呼吸道感染。
lines.en: Open wide and let me have a look… your throat is inflamed — it looks like an upper respiratory infection.

lines.formal: 嚴重嗎？需要吃抗生素嗎？
lines.colloquial: 嚴唔嚴重㗎？使唔使食抗生素呀？
lines.en: Is it serious? Do I need antibiotics?

lines.formal: 不用，我開三天退燒藥和止痛藥給你，記得多喝水多休息。
lines.colloquial: 唔使，我開三日退燒藥同止痛藥畀你，記住多飲水多休息。
lines.en: No need — I'll prescribe three days of fever medicine and painkillers. Remember to drink plenty of water and rest.

lines.formal: 可以幫我寫一張醫生證明嗎？我想請兩天病假。
lines.colloquial: 可唔可以幫我寫張醫生紙呀？我想請兩日病假。
lines.en: Could you write me a sick note? I'd like to take two days of sick leave.

lines.formal: 可以。連藥物一共三百五十元，出去向護士付款就可以了。
lines.colloquial: 得。連埋啲藥總共三百五十蚊，出去同姑娘畀錢就得喇。
lines.en: Sure. It's three hundred and fifty dollars including the medicine — just pay the nurse outside.

lines.formal: 好的，謝謝醫生。
lines.colloquial: 好，唔該晒醫生。
lines.en: Okay — thank you, doctor.

lines.formal: 你好，我傷風，還有點頭痛，有什麼藥適合？
lines.colloquial: 你好，我傷風，仲有啲頭痛，有咩藥啱食呀？
lines.en: Hi, I've got a cold and a bit of a headache — what medicine would suit?

lines.formal: 這款傷風感冒藥挺好，退燒止痛都可以。
lines.colloquial: 呢款傷風感冒藥幾好，退燒止痛都得。
lines.en: This cold-and-flu medicine is quite good — it covers fever and pain relief too.

lines.formal: 吃了會不會想睡覺？我下午還要上班。
lines.colloquial: 食咗會唔會眼瞓㗎？我下晝仲要返工。
lines.en: Will it make me drowsy? I still have to work this afternoon.

lines.formal: 這款吃了會有睡意。如果要上班，建議拿這款沒有睡意的。
lines.colloquial: 呢款食咗會眼瞓嘅。如果要返工，就攞呢款non-drowsy啦。
lines.en: This one does cause drowsiness. If you're working, take this non-drowsy one instead.

lines.formal: 好，要沒有睡意那款。應該怎樣吃？
lines.colloquial: 好，要non-drowsy嗰款。點食㗎？
lines.en: Okay, the non-drowsy one. How do I take it?

lines.formal: 一次一粒，一天三次，飯後吃。
lines.colloquial: 一次一粒，一日三次，食完飯食。
lines.en: One tablet at a time, three times a day, after meals.

lines.formal: 明白。多少錢？
lines.colloquial: 明白。幾多錢呀？
lines.en: Got it. How much?

lines.formal: 六十八元一盒。
lines.colloquial: 六十八蚊一盒。
lines.en: Sixty-eight dollars a box.

lines.formal: 好，要一盒，謝謝。
lines.colloquial: 好，要一盒，唔該。
lines.en: Okay, one box please — thanks.

lines.formal: 好的。如果三天後還不退燒，就要看醫生了。
lines.colloquial: 好嘅。如果三日之後仲唔退燒，就要睇醫生喇。
lines.en: Sure. If the fever hasn't gone after three days, you should see a doctor.

lines.formal: 我覺得有點不舒服，頭很暈。
lines.colloquial: 我覺得有啲唔舒服，個頭好暈。
lines.en: I'm not feeling well — my head is really dizzy.

lines.formal: 你的臉色很差，是不是發燒？
lines.colloquial: 你面色好差喎，係唔係發燒呀？
lines.en: You look terrible — do you have a fever?

lines.formal: 好像有點熱，喉嚨也痛。
lines.colloquial: 好似有啲熱，喉嚨又痛。
lines.en: I feel a bit hot, and my throat hurts too.

lines.formal: 那就早點回家休息吧，不要硬撐。
lines.colloquial: 咁就早啲返屋企休息啦，唔好死頂。
lines.en: Then go home early and rest — don't tough it out.

lines.formal: 可是我還有一件急事沒做完。
lines.colloquial: 但係我仲有一件急事未做完。
lines.en: But I still have one urgent thing unfinished.

lines.formal: 什麼事？我幫你跟進吧。
lines.colloquial: 咩事呀？我幫你跟進啦。
lines.en: What is it? I'll follow up for you.

lines.formal: 五點之前要把報價單發給客戶，檔案已經放在共用資料夾。
lines.colloquial: 五點之前要send張報價單畀個客，個file已經擺咗喺shared folder度。
lines.en: The quotation has to go to the client by five — the file is already in the shared folder.

lines.formal: 放心，交給我。你快點回去休息，記得看醫生。
lines.colloquial: 放心，交畀我啦。你快啲返去休息，記住睇醫生。
lines.en: Don't worry, leave it to me. Hurry home and rest — and remember to see a doctor.

lines.formal: 謝謝你，明天有什麼事隨時打給我。
lines.colloquial: 唔該晒你，聽日有咩事隨時打畀我。
lines.en: Thanks so much — call me any time tomorrow if anything comes up.

lines.formal: 不用擔心，早點康復！
lines.colloquial: 唔使擔心，早啲好返啦！
lines.en: Don't worry — get well soon!

lines.formal: 天文台說今晚十點會發出八號風球。
lines.colloquial: 天文台話今晚十點會掛八號波。
lines.en: The Observatory says the T8 signal will go up at ten tonight.

lines.formal: 真的嗎？那明天怎樣上班？
lines.colloquial: 真係㗎？咁聽日返工點算呀？
lines.en: Really? Then what happens with work tomorrow?

lines.formal: 公司規定，八號風球期間辦公室關閉，全部人在家工作。
lines.colloquial: 公司規定，八號風球期間office唔開，全部人WFH。
lines.en: Company policy: while the T8 is up the office is closed and everyone works from home.

lines.formal: 明白。那明天早上九點的客戶會議呢？
lines.colloquial: 明白。咁聽朝九點個client meeting呢？
lines.en: Got it. What about the nine o'clock client meeting tomorrow morning?

lines.formal: 改為視像會議吧，我今晚發連結給大家。
lines.colloquial: 改做video call啦，我今晚send個link畀大家。
lines.en: Let's make it a video call — I'll send everyone the link tonight.

lines.formal: 好。如果中午之前改發三號風球呢？
lines.colloquial: 好。如果晏晝之前改咗三號呢？
lines.en: Okay. And what if the signal drops to T3 before noon?

lines.formal: 按照公司規定，三號風球發出後兩小時內要回到辦公室。
lines.colloquial: 照公司規矩，改咗三號之後兩個鐘之內要返office。
lines.en: By company rules, we have to be back in the office within two hours of the T3 going up.

lines.formal: 明白了。記得早點回家，順便買一些食物。
lines.colloquial: 明喇。記得早啲返屋企，買定啲嘢食睇門口。
lines.en: Understood. Remember to head home early — and stock up on some food just in case.

lines.formal: 對，超級市場現在一定很多人。
lines.colloquial: 係呀，超市而家一定好多人。
lines.en: Right — the supermarket is bound to be packed right now.

lines.formal: 好，明天網上見，注意安全！
lines.colloquial: 好，聽日online見，小心啲呀！
lines.en: See you online tomorrow then — stay safe!
